hero.title: Quiz
hero.description: Build clean, focused quizzes that feel premium to take and effortless to manage. Pick a topic, run the quiz, and store results automatically.
points: Structured taxonomy: platform → subject → topic → roadmap
Attempts saved per user for progress tracking
hero.note: No setup. No clutter. Just clean flows.

flow.title: Six steps to a finished attempt

differences.title: What makes Quiz different
differences.description: It is built for calm, premium learning flows. Everything is purposeful, nothing is noisy.

items.title: Roadmap-first structure
items.description: Keep questions aligned to syllabi, chapters, or career tracks with clarity.

items.title: Instant feedback
items.description: Correct answers and scoring appear the moment the quiz ends.

items.title: Reusable by design
items.description: Build once and reuse across batches, teams, or semesters without rework.

items.title: Clean admin control
items.description: Manage platforms, subjects, topics, and questions with the same Ansiversa UI.

items.title: Result history
items.description: Attempts are designed to remain reviewable with full answer breakdowns.

items.title: Scales across domains
items.description: Medical, engineering, law, finance, aptitude, and more in one system.

feel.title: How it feels to use
feel.description: A guided flow that keeps learners focused and gives mentors quick insight.

items.title: Pick a topic with clarity
items.description: Filters make it easy to reach the right roadmap without scrolling forever.

items.title: Answer with zero distractions
items.description: One question at a time, crisp options, and a clean progress rhythm.

items.title: Review and save automatically
items.description: Scores and answer reviews are stored so learners can see improvement.

audiences.title: Who uses Quiz
audiences.description: From classrooms to corporate training, Quiz fits any learning environment.

items.title: Schools & teachers
items.description: Chapter-end quizzes and quick checks to track class understanding.

items.title: Coaching institutes
items.description: Entrance exam practice with structured topics and difficulty levels.

items.title: Teams & HR
items.description: Onboarding knowledge checks, policy assessments, and skill evaluations.

items.title: Self learners
items.description: Build personalized quizzes for fast revision and stronger recall.

resourceSection.title: Works with your learning stack
resourceSection.description: Quiz is designed to complement other Ansiversa mini apps.

items.title: Turn notes into recall-ready prompts.
items.description: Teach with notes, then convert them into instant quizzes.

items.title: Scale up to timed mock exams.
items.description: Start with quizzes, then build full exam flows.

items.title: Bring quizzes into live battles.
items.description: Use quiz content for fast, competitive revisions.
